achievements.title: Tarn Apart
achievements.description: Recover the Book of Elna from Tarn's Manor.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: What Would Freud Think?
achievements.description: Rid Wendell's Dream of its unwanted guests.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Ladders Aren't Real
achievements.description: Clear the Coal Mine of Murgg.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Crypt Creeper
achievements.description: Defeat the Ancient Guardian and procure your first Crest in Lars' Crypt.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Wet Dream
achievements.description: Chase out the temptress haunting Bonaire's Dream.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Herculean Trial
achievements.description: Pass the Test of Strength at the Ancient Shrine and claim your rewards.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Hydrophobia
achievements.description: Prove yourself worthy of Vul's gift in the Coastal Cave.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Moonlight, a Superstitous Glow
achievements.description: Deal with the aftereffects of Kline's Nightmare.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Snake Charmer
achievements.description: Seize your second Crest from the depths of the Reptile Lair.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Sleep Apnea
achievements.description: Defeat the vile beast inhabiting Giles' Dream.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Styx and Stones
achievements.description: Return to the land of the living after meeting with Magyscar's Guardian.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Where Fears and Lies Melt Away
achievements.description: Finish your investigation of the Sanctuary with Septimus.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Keep Moving
achievements.description: Reveal the mysterious visitor's motives in Meia's Dream.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: The Dreamwalker, The Hero, and The Plumber
achievements.description: Destroy the machine impeding your progress and escape the Underground Waterway.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Opposites Attract
achievements.description: Earn the respect of Nirude's remaining subjects, nabbing a new Crest in the process.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Release Her? I Barely Know Her!
achievements.description: Solve a serious case of identity crisis in Elene's Dream.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Heart of Fire
achievements.description: Obtain the Fire Wand and gain dominion over the power of flame itself.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Violent Intervention
achievements.description: Wipe out Zazan's drugged-out forces in Murgg Woods.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Gratuitous Murgger
achievements.description: Recover the missing Crests from the Tower of the Great Tree.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Absolute Zero
achievements.description: Obtain the Ice Wand and prove once and for all that you're a pretty cool guy.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Dragon Dance
achievements.description: Emerge victorious against the Guardian of Torla Mountain and claim the penultimate Crest.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Gemini
achievements.description: Take out the terrors haunting the twins' shared subconscious in Nestus' Dream.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: A Sword for a Hero
achievements.description: Obtain the Holy Sword, the culmination of the villagers' trust in your ability to see things through.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Finders Keepers
achievements.description: Defeat Zorgia and escape Nava's Keep with the final Crest in hand.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: One Step Forward, Two Steps Back
achievements.description: Confront Melzas at the entrance of the Lake Shrine Interior.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: A Nightmare Vanquished
achievements.description: Defeat Melzas and free the denizens of Torla from their recurring nightmares.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Friend of the Fair Folk
achievements.description: Accept a gift from the inhabitants of the Fairy Pond.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Quick of Feet, Quick of Mind
achievements.description: Learn the five signs that bind the world from Berue.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Accomplished Adventurer
achievements.description: Activate all the warp gates.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Somebody Poisoned the Waterhole
achievements.description: Activate the warp pad at the bottom of Inoa's well.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: One Vice for Another
achievements.description: Appropriate someone's Secret Pass.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: They're All Sticky...
achievements.description: Clean out the Slime Busters room of every last prize.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Having a GOOd Time
achievements.description: Obtain a total score of 175 or more in one game of Slime Busters.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Steady Hand
achievements.description: Clean out the Monster Shooting room of every last prize.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Slime Kebab
achievements.description: Obtain a total score of 90 or more in one game of Monster Shooting.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Audentes Fortuna Iuvat
achievements.description: Clean out the Gilder Roulette room of every last prize.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Healthy Vessel
achievements.description: Find all the Life Vessels scattered about Torla.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Blooming Magician
achievements.description: Find all the Magic Seeds scattered about Torla.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Knuckle Duster
achievements.description: Exchange 20 Gilded Falcons for Olga's Ring.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Monsters' Bane
achievements.description: Exchange 30 Gilded Falcons for the Silver Armlet.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Panacea
achievements.description: Exchange 40 Gilded Falcons for the Recovery Ring.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Master of the Arcane Arts
achievements.description: Exchange all 50 Gilded Falcons for the Spirit Wand.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Neophyte
achievements.description: Collect all four elemental scrolls.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Classic Literature
achievements.description: Collect all four elemental spellbooks.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Thrifty
achievements.description: Purchase the Leather Armor.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Family Heirloom
achievements.description: Have the Ancient Armor restored for free.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Knight in Shining Armor
achievements.description: Receive the Silver Armor.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Zolists' Ward
achievements.description: Obtain Nava's Charm.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Performance Enhancer
achievements.description: Obtain King Snow's legendary sword. [WARNING: All other achievements are now locked, do not save your game!]
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: The Tomb Goes Boom
achievements.description: Defeat the Ancient Guardian in under 1m30s without using consumable items.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: One Merrick's Hard Lemonade, Please
achievements.description: Embarass yourself in front of some old acquaintances.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Paroxysm
achievements.description: Witness the effects of Nadia's mysterious condition.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Quickturn Artiste
achievements.description: Execute 4 dash-turns in a single, uninterrupted sprint.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: The Somnambulist
achievements.description: Dash through both bridge puzzles in Wendell's Dream in a single, uninterrupted sprint.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Kalinka? Malinka?
achievements.description: Defeat the Gelatinoid without taking damage while attacking each segment in order of largest to smallest.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: As Fast as a Falcon
achievements.description: Acquire the Gilded Falcon from Olen's Nightmare before you're forced out.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Unadventurous Kleptomaniac
achievements.description: Loot every chest within the thickly settled region. [Inoa Village, Central Torla, Coal Mine, Lars' Crypt, Sanctuary]
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Half-Conscious Kleptomaniac
achievements.description: Loot every chest within the dreams of Giles and Meia.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Well-Rested Kleptomaniac
achievements.description: Loot every chest within the dreams of Elene and Nestus.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Sure-Footed Kleptomaniac
achievements.description: Loot every chest within the rough terrain in the southeast. [Cliffs of Madness, Despair Desert, Ancient Shrine]
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Waterlogged Kleptomaniac
achievements.description: Loot every chest within the western forested region and coastline. [Southwestern Torla, Coastal Cave, Fairy Pond, Nava's Keep]
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Dauntless Kleptomaniac
achievements.description: Loot every chest within the enemy's territory. [The Lake, Murgg Woods, Tower of the Great Tree, Lake Shrine]
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Well Traveled Kleptomaniac
achievements.description: Loot every chest within the eastern forested region. [Eastern Torla, Tarn's Manor, Reptile Lair, Underground Waterway]
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Pathfinding Kleptomaniac
achievements.description: Loot every chest within the northern cliffs. [Northwestern Torla, Magyscar, Nirude's Lair, Torla Mountain]
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Sleep-Addled Kleptomaniac
achievements.description: Loot every chest within the dreams of Wendell, Bonaire, and Kline.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: All That's Gilded is Indeed Gold
achievements.description: Accrue a total of 1000 or more gilder.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Succubye
achievements.description: Defeat Sara with a single attack.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Ceaseless Watcher
achievements.description: Defeat Watcher in the Water without taking damage or using consumables.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Ereptile Dysfunction
achievements.description: Defeat Reptilicus Maximus without taking damage or using spells.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.description: Defeat Melzas's final form without using spells or consumable items.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Astute Hunter
achievements.description: Defeat Melzas's first form without using spells or missing an opportunity to attack.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Last Rites
achievements.description: Defeat the Corpse Worm in under 1m10s without using consumable items.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: King of the Murgg
achievements.description: Defeat Zazan without taking damage or using spells.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Fun with Numbers
achievements.description: Defeat the Terror Twins in three attacks or less.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Virtue's Last Reward
achievements.description: Defeat Ronan without taking damage or using consumable items.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Vampire Slayer
achievements.description: Defeat Zorgia without using consumable items.
achievements.author: Infernox
